{%- comment -%} Overrides the competitive-verifier theme's dependencies.html to display paths with the leading "src/" stripped (headers are included with bare names via -I src). Links keep the full path. {%- endcomment -%} {%- for dep in include.data.dependencies -%} {%- if dep.files.size != 0 -%}

{{dep.type}}

    {%- for item in dep.files -%} {%- assign name = item.path | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if item.title -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{item.title | xml_escape }} ({{ name | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture link_title -%}{{name | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%} {%- comment -%} Catch2 unit tests are not verification files; mark them instead of the not-verified icon. {%- endcomment -%} {%- if item.path contains ".test.cpp" and item.path contains "src/" -%}
  • 🧪 {{ link_title | xml_escape }}
    • {%- else -%}
  • {{ site.icons[item.icon] }} {{ link_title | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
